perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman wearing a white bucket hat and a white long-sleeved shirt stands in the aisle of a Costco warehouse, holding two plush toy and blanket sets. She smiles excitedly at the camera. (2) The camera zooms in on the price tag and the products, which are baby blanket gift sets featuring blue bears and pink rabbits. (3) The woman gestures toward the large inventory of these sets on the warehouse shelves behind her, continuing to speak with high energy and varied facial expressions. (4) Close-up shots of the product packaging and the detailed texture of the plush toys and blankets are shown as she holds them up for the viewer.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat and high-tempo background music starts immediately. A young woman's voice enters, sounding very excited, high-pitched, and fast-paced. (2) The vocal continues as she describes the price discount and the contents of the gift set. Background ambient noise of a busy retail environment is faint but present. (3) The music maintains a constant rhythm through to the end as the woman concludes her recommendation with an enthusiastic tone.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative Hook: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' and '大家搶著買' (Everyone is rushing to buy) appears at the top in large colorful fonts. (2) Functional/Hook: '黑五好康' (Black Friday Deals) and '超美毛布偶寶寶毯 扯爆只要359元!' (Super beautiful plush baby blanket, crazy price only 359!) displayed prominently to highlight the deal. (3) Functional: Subtitles at the bottom translate the spoken Mandarin narration throughout the video.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Price Highlight -> Product Close-up -> Recommendation

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 2 blurred shoppers/passers-by in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white bucket hat with a NY logo, a white knit sweater, blue jeans, and a brown crossbody bag.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Large industrial shelving units filled with stacked boxes of baby blanket gift sets and other warehouse merchandise.
visual_scene_and_style.season: Winter (based on Black Friday context and clothing)

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a high-energy deal alert or product recommendation for a Black Friday sale at Costco. The creator aims to persuade viewers to purchase a specific '3-piece baby blanket and toy gift set' by highlighting its aesthetic appeal, contents, and significant price reduction from 459 to 359 yuan.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator is actively promoting a specific product's price and value within a retail environment.
endorsementObject: Costco Baby Blanket & Toy Gift Set

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-speed Mandarin narration, enthusiastic facial expressions, and dense colorful text overlays characteristic of Taiwanese 'shopping tip' influencers.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video effectively uses the 'Black Friday' scarcity hook to drive immediate consumer interest.
